sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Dodge and Counterattack
special_mechanics.description: Revised mechanics with better reactions from fighters compared to KOF '94

special_mechanics.name: Team Edit Feature
special_mechanics.description: Allows players to create custom teams from 24 characters with varying movesets and characteristics

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay overview but no quantitative physics parameters. Fighting game with character variety but mechanics documentation limited to high-level descriptions of dodge/counterattack revisions.
